description_long: This object is a handheld hair dryer with a sleek, elongated barrel and a robust, ergonomic handle. The main body is predominantly dark blue with black accents, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The nozzle is long and narrow, designed to focus airflow for precise drying or cleaning tasks. The handle features a visible trigger or button, likely for power or speed control, and is shaped for a comfortable grip. The air intake grill is located on the side of the main body, with a slotted or vented pattern for efficient airflow. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic, with some internal metal components for the motor and heating element.
description: A dark blue and black handheld hair dryer with a long, narrow nozzle and ergonomic handle, featuring a slotted air intake grill and visible control button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hair dryer, including the long nozzle, ergonomic handle, and slotted air intake grill.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular opening of the nozzle and the compact width of the main body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle, nozzle, and the air intake grill, with the trigger/button visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the alignment of the nozzle with the main body.
attribute_nozzle_design: The nozzle is long, narrow, and integrated, designed as a concentrator for focused airflow. It appears to be a single piece with a tapered end for precision.
attribute_air_intake_grill_pattern: The air intake grill features a slotted pattern with parallel vents arranged on the side of the main body.
attribute_handle_orientation: The handle is perpendicular to the main barrel, forming a classic pistol-grip shape.
